member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.Vulkan
member.summary: Provides Vulkan specific constants for special values, layer names and extension names.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.Vulkan.vkEnumerateDeviceExtensionProperties(Vortice.Vulkan.VkPhysicalDevice,System.String)
member.summary: Returns properties of available physical device extensions
member.param: The that will be queried.
Is either null/empty or a string naming the layer to retrieve extensions from.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.Vulkan.vkEnumerateInstanceVersion
member.summary: Query instance-level version before instance creation.
member.returns: The version of Vulkan supported by instance-level functionality.

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.NotReady
member.summary: A fence or query has not yet completed

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.Timeout
member.summary: A wait operation has not completed in the specified time

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.Incomplete
member.summary: A return array was too small for the result

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorOutOfHostMemory
member.summary: A host memory allocation has failed

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorOutOfDeviceMemory
member.summary: A device memory allocation has failed

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorInitializationFailed
member.summary: Initialization of an object has failed

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorDeviceLost
member.summary: The logical device has been lost. See <<devsandqueues-lost-device>>

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorMemoryMapFailed
member.summary: Mapping of a memory object has failed

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorFeatureNotPresent
member.summary: Requested feature is not available on this device

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorIncompatibleDriver
member.summary: Unable to find a Vulkan driver

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorTooManyObjects
member.summary: Too many objects of the type have already been created

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorFormatNotSupported
member.summary: Requested format is not supported on this device

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorFragmentedPool
member.summary: A requested pool allocation has failed due to fragmentation of the pool's memory

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkResult.ErrorUnknown
member.summary: An unknown error has occurred, due to an implementation or application bug

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkStructureType.LoaderInstanceCreateInfo
member.summary: Reserved for internal use by the loader, layers, and ICDs

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkStructureType.LoaderDeviceCreateInfo
member.summary: Reserved for internal use by the loader, layers, and ICDs

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.Undefined
member.summary: Implicit layout an image is when its contents are undefined due to various reasons (e.g. right after creation)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.General
member.summary: General layout when image can be used for any kind of access

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.ColorAttachmentOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is only used for color attachment read/write

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.DepthStencilAttachmentOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is only used for depth/stencil attachment read/write

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.DepthStencilReadOnlyOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is used for read only depth/stencil attachment and shader access

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.ShaderReadOnlyOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is used for read only shader access

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.TransferSrcOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is used only as source of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.TransferDstOptimal
member.summary: Optimal layout when image is used only as destination of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageLayout.Preinitialized
member.summary: Initial layout used when the data is populated by the CPU

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkObjectType
member.summary: Enums to track objects of various types - also see objtypeenum attributes on type tags

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.IndirectCommandRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of indirect command reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.VertexAttributeRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of vertex attribute reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.UniformRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of uniform buffer reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.InputAttachmentRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of input attachment reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.ColorAttachmentRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of color attachment reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.ColorAttachmentWrite
member.summary: Controls coherency of color attachment writes

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.DepthStencilAttachmentRead
member.summary: Controls coherency of depth/stencil attachment reads

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAccessFlags.DepthStencilAttachmentWrite
member.summary: Controls coherency of depth/stencil attachment writes

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.SampledImage
member.summary: Format can be used for sampled images (SAMPLED_IMAGE and COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER descriptor types)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.StorageImage
member.summary: Format can be used for storage images (STORAGE_IMAGE descriptor type)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.StorageImageAtomic
member.summary: Format supports atomic operations in case it is used for storage images

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.UniformTexelBuffer
member.summary: Format can be used for uniform texel buffers (TBOs)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.StorageTexelBuffer
member.summary: Format can be used for storage texel buffers (IBOs)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.StorageTexelBufferAtomic
member.summary: Format supports atomic operations in case it is used for storage texel buffers

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.VertexBuffer
member.summary: Format can be used for vertex buffers (VBOs)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.ColorAttachment
member.summary: Format can be used for color attachment images

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.ColorAttachmentBlend
member.summary: Format supports blending in case it is used for color attachment images

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.DepthStencilAttachment
member.summary: Format can be used for depth/stencil attachment images

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.BlitSrc
member.summary: Format can be used as the source image of blits with vkCmdBlitImage

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.BlitDst
member.summary: Format can be used as the destination image of blits with vkCmdBlitImage

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormatFeatureFlags.SampledImageFilterLinear
member.summary: Format can be filtered with VK_FILTER_LINEAR when being sampled

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageCreateFlags.SparseResidency
member.summary: Image should support sparse backing with partial residency

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageCreateFlags.SparseAliased
member.summary: Image should support constant data access to physical memory ranges mapped into multiple locations of sparse images

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageCreateFlags.MutableFormat
member.summary: Allows image views to have different format than the base image

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageCreateFlags.CubeCompatible
member.summary: Allows creating image views with cube type from the created image

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.TransferSrc
member.summary: Can be used as a source of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.TransferDst
member.summary: Can be used as a destination of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.Sampled
member.summary: Can be sampled from (SAMPLED_IMAGE and COMBINED_IMAGE_SAMPLER descriptor types)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.Storage
member.summary: Can be used as storage image (STORAGE_IMAGE descriptor type)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.ColorAttachment
member.summary: Can be used as framebuffer color attachment

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.DepthStencilAttachment
member.summary: Can be used as framebuffer depth/stencil attachment

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.TransientAttachment
member.summary: Image data not needed outside of rendering

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageUsageFlags.InputAttachment
member.summary: Can be used as framebuffer input attachment

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryHeapFlags.DeviceLocal
member.summary: If set, heap represents device memory

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryPropertyFlags.DeviceLocal
member.summary: If otherwise stated, then allocate memory on device

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryPropertyFlags.HostCoherent
member.summary: Memory will have i/o coherency. If not set, application may need to use vkFlushMappedMemoryRanges and vkInvalidateMappedMemoryRanges to flush/invalidate host cache

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryPropertyFlags.HostCached
member.summary: Memory will be cached by the host

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryPropertyFlags.LazilyAllocated
member.summary: Memory may be allocated by the driver when it is required

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueueFlags.SparseBinding
member.summary: Queue supports sparse resource memory management operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineStageFlags.Host
member.summary: Indicates host (CPU) is a source/sink of the dependency

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineStageFlags.AllGraphics
member.summary: All stages of the graphics pipeline

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineStageFlags.AllCommands
member.summary: All stages supported on the queue

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSparseMemoryBindFlags.Metadata
member.summary: Operation binds resource metadata to memory

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSparseImageFormatFlags.SingleMiptail
member.summary: Image uses a single mip tail region for all array layers

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSparseImageFormatFlags.AlignedMipSize
member.summary: Image requires mip level dimensions to be an integer multiple of the sparse image block dimensions for non-tail mip levels.

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSparseImageFormatFlags.NonstandardBlockSize
member.summary: Image uses a non-standard sparse image block dimensions

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueryResultFlags.Bit64
member.summary: Results of the queries are written to the destination buffer as 64-bit values

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueryResultFlags.Wait
member.summary: Results of the queries are waited on before proceeding with the result copy

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueryResultFlags.WithAvailability
member.summary: Besides the results of the query, the availability of the results is also written

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueryResultFlags.Partial
member.summary: Copy the partial results of the query even if the final results are not available

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferCreateFlags.SparseResidency
member.summary: Buffer should support sparse backing with partial residency

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferCreateFlags.SparseAliased
member.summary: Buffer should support constant data access to physical memory ranges mapped into multiple locations of sparse buffers

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferUsageFlags.TransferSrc
member.summary: Can be used as a source of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferUsageFlags.TransferDst
member.summary: Can be used as a destination of transfer operations

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferUsageFlags.IndexBuffer
member.summary: Can be used as source of fixed-function index fetch (index buffer)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferUsageFlags.VertexBuffer
member.summary: Can be used as source of fixed-function vertex fetch (VBO)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferUsageFlags.IndirectBuffer
member.summary: Can be the source of indirect parameters (e.g. indirect buffer, parameter buffer)

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkDescriptorPoolCreateFlags.FreeDescriptorSet
member.summary: Descriptor sets may be freed individually

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkAttachmentDescriptionFlags.MayAlias
member.summary: The attachment may alias physical memory of another attachment in the same render pass

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkCommandPoolCreateFlags.Transient
member.summary: Command buffers have a short lifetime

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkCommandPoolCreateFlags.ResetCommandBuffer
member.summary: Command buffers may release their memory individually

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkCommandPoolResetFlags.ReleaseResources
member.summary: Release resources owned by the pool

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkCommandBufferUsageFlags.SimultaneousUse
member.summary: Command buffer may be submitted/executed more than once simultaneously

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkQueryControlFlags.Precise
member.summary: Require precise results to be collected by the query

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkCommandBufferResetFlags.ReleaseResources
member.summary: Release resources owned by the buffer

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkDescriptorUpdateTemplateType.DescriptorSet
member.summary: Create descriptor update template for descriptor set updates

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPeerMemoryFeatureFlags.GenericSrc
member.summary: Can read with any access type/command

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPeerMemoryFeatureFlags.GenericDst
member.summary: Can write with and access type/command

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkDeviceGroupPresentModeFlagsKHR.Sum
member.summary: Present sum of local and/or remote memory

member.name: F:Vortice.Vulkan.VkDeviceGroupPresentModeFlagsKHR.LocalMultiDevice
member.summary: Each physical device presents from local memory

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkVideoComponentBitDepthFlagsKHR
member.summary: Vulkan video component bit depth definitions

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkExtent2D.Zero
member.summary: An with all of its components set to zero.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkExtent2D.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of structure.
member.param: The width component of the extent.
The height component of the extent.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of structure.
member.param: The width component of the extent.
The height component of the extent.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkExtent3D.Zero
member.summary: An with all of its components set to zero.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of structure.
member.param: The width component of the extent.
The height component of the extent.
The depth component of the extent.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of structure.
member.param: The width component of the extent.
The height component of the extent.
The depth component of the extent.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkOffset2D.Zero
member.summary: An with all of its components set to zero.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkOffset3D.Zero
member.summary: An with all of its components set to zero.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkRect2D.Zero
member.summary: An with all of its components set to zero.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkRect2D.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: The X component of the offset.
The Y component of the offset.
The width component of the extent.
The height component of the extent.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkRect2D.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkOffset2D,Vortice.Vulkan.VkExtent2D)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: The offset component of the rectangle.
The extent component of the rectangle.

member.summary: Structure specifying a buffer memory barrier.

member.summary: Structure specifying an image subresource range.

member.summary: Structure specifying the parameters of an image memory barrier.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryBarrier
member.summary: Structure specifying a global memory barrier.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMappedMemoryRange
member.summary: Structure specifying a mapped memory range.

member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created fence.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkComponentMapping
member.summary: Structure specifying a color component mapping.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageViewCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created image view

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkVertexInputBindingDescription
member.summary: Structure specifying vertex input binding description

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkVertexInputAttributeDescription
member.summary: Structure specifying vertex input attribute description

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineVertexInputStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline vertex input state

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineInputAssemblyStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline input assembly state

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineTessellationStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline tessellation state

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The width of the viewport in pixels.
The height of the viewport in pixels.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The x coordinate of the upper-left corner of the viewport in pixels.
The y coordinate of the upper-left corner of the viewport in pixels.
The width of the viewport in pixels.
The height of the viewport in pixels.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The x coordinate of the upper-left corner of the viewport in pixels.
The y coordinate of the upper-left corner of the viewport in pixels.
The width of the viewport in pixels.
The height of the viewport in pixels.
The minimum depth of the clip volume.
The maximum depth of the clip volume.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkExtent2D@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: The width and height extent of the viewport in pixels.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkRect2D@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: A that defines the location and size of the viewport in a render target.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.#ctor(System.Numerics.Vector4@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: A that defines the location and size of the viewport in a render target.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.op_Equality(Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport,Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport)
member.param: The on the left hand of the operand.
The on the right hand of the operand.
member.returns: True if the current left is equal to the parameter; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport.op_Inequality(Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport,Vortice.Vulkan.VkViewport)
member.param: The on the left hand of the operand.
The on the right hand of the operand.
member.returns: True if the current left is unequal to the parameter; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineViewportStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline viewport state

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline rasterization state

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo.CullNone
member.summary: A built-in description with settings with settings for not culling any primitives.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo.CullClockwise
member.summary: A built-in description with settings for culling primitives with clockwise winding order.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo.CullCounterClockwise
member.summary: A built-in description with settings for culling primitives with counter-clockwise winding order.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineRasterizationStateCreateInfo.Wireframe
member.summary: A built-in description with settings for not culling any primitives and wireframe fill mode.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineMultisampleStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline multisample state

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkStencilOpState.Default
member.summary: A built-in description with default values.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline depth stencil state

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo.None
member.summary: A built-in description with settings for not using a depth stencil buffer.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo.Default
member.summary: A built-in description with default settings for using a depth stencil buffer.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo.Read
member.summary: A built-in description with settings for enabling a read-only depth stencil buffer.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo.ReverseZ
member.summary: A built-in description with default settings for using a reverse depth stencil buffer.

member.name: P:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineDepthStencilStateCreateInfo.ReadReverseZ
member.summary: A built-in description with default settings for using a reverse read-only depth stencil buffer.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState
member.summary: Structure specifying a pipeline color blend attachment state

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkPipelineColorBlendStateCreateInfo
member.summary: Structure specifying parameters of a newly created pipeline color blend state

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageSubresourceLayers
member.summary: Structure specifying an image subresource layers.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearDepthStencilValue
member.summary: Structure specifying a clear depth stencil value.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearDepthStencilValue.#ctor(System.Single,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: The depth clear value.
The stencil clear value.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearValue.#ctor(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: The red value.
The green value.
The blue value.
The alpha value.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearValue.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearColorValue@)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: The clear color value.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearValue.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearDepthStencilValue)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the structure.
member.param: Specifies the depth and stencil clear values to use when clearing a depth/stencil image or attachment.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkMemoryBarrier2
member.summary: Structure specifying a global memory barrier.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBufferMemoryBarrier2
member.summary: Structure specifying a buffer memory barrier.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkImageMemoryBarrier2
member.summary: Structure specifying the parameters of an image memory barrier.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSurfaceFormatKHR
member.summary: Structure describing a supported swapchain format-color space pair.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkSurfaceFormatKHR.#ctor(Vortice.Vulkan.VkFormat,Vortice.Vulkan.VkColorSpaceKHR)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Is the that is compatible with the specified surface.
Is a presentation that is compatible with the surface.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32
member.summary: A boolean value stored on 4 bytes (instead of 1 in .NET).

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: if set to true [bool value].

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.Equals(Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32)
member.summary: Indicates whether this instance and a specified object are equal.
member.param: The other.
member.returns: true if and this instance are the same type and represent the same value; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.op_Equality(Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32,Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32)
member.param: The left.
The right.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.op_Inequality(Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32,Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32)
member.param: The left.
The right.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.op_Implicit(Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32)~System.Boolean
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from to .
member.param: The value.

member.name: M:Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32.op_Implicit(System.Boolean)~Vortice.Vulkan.VkBool32
member.summary: Performs an explicit conversion from to .
member.param: The value.

member.name: T:Vortice.Vulkan.VkClearColorValue
member.summary: Structure specifying a clear color value.

member.summary: The exception class for errors that occur in vulkan.

member.summary: Gets the result returned by Vulkan.

member.summary: Gets if the result is considered an error.
